expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs search (not jira.mjs) as primary search
expectations.evidence: Steps 2-4 all use confluence.mjs search as primary. Jira search is explicitly labeled 'Optional Secondary Jira Search' in Step 6. 'Confluence-first approach -- The user explicitly asked about Confluence, so that is the primary search target.'

expectations.text: CQL includes terms like deployment, runbook, or deploy
expectations.evidence: CQL queries include: 'title ~ "deployment runbook"', 'text ~ "deployment runbook"', 'title ~ "runbook"', 'text ~ "deployment" AND label = "runbook"'

expectations.text: Plans to fetch full page content with confluence.mjs get-page
expectations.evidence: Step 5: 'For the top 3-5 most relevant results from the searches above, retrieve full page content' using 'confluence.mjs get-page <pageId>'

expectations.text: Presents results with page title and source citation
expectations.evidence: Step 7: 'List each matching Confluence page with title, space, page ID, and direct URL', 'Cite sources with links (e.g., https://wnesolutions.atlassian.net/wiki/...)'
